text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: 这是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: Microsoft has announced its first tablet computer.
zh: 微软发布了它的首款平板电脑。

text: The device, called the Surface, is designed to compete directly with the popular iPad.
zh: 这款名为Surface的设备,旨在与广受欢迎的iPad正面竞争。

text: The computer software maker announced its new tablet in June at a media event in Los Angeles.
zh: 这家计算机软件厂商于六月在洛杉矶的一场媒体活动上发布了它的新平板。

text: Microsoft will offer two versions of the Surface.
zh: 微软将推出两个版本的Surface。

text: Each has a different processor.
zh: 每款采用不同的处理器。

text: The Surface for Windows RT runs on an ARM processor.
zh: 面向Windows RT的Surface采用ARM处理器。

text: It is less powerful than the Surface for Windows 8 Pro, which uses an Intel processor.
zh: 它的性能不如采用英特尔处理器的Surface for Windows 8 Pro。

text: The RT is also thinner and weighs less than the Pro.
zh: RT版也比Pro版更薄、更轻。

text: Either tablet weighs no more than about 900 grams.
zh: 两款平板的重量都不超过约900克。

text: Both have screens that are about 27 centimeters in size.
zh: 两者的屏幕尺寸都约为27厘米。

text: That is a little bigger than the iPad screen.
zh: 这比iPad的屏幕略大一些。

text: Microsoft has not said exactly when the new Surface will appear in stores, but it is expected to be sometime time in September or October.
zh: 微软没有明确说新款Surface何时上市,但预计会在九月或十月的某个时候。

text: This is about the same time that the company plans to release its new Windows 8 computer operating system.
zh: 这与该公司计划发布新的Windows 8操作系统的时间大致相同。

text: Brenda Estrella owns a laptop computer.
zh: 布伦达·埃斯特雷拉有一台笔记本电脑。

text: She has been considering switching to a tablet.
zh: 她一直在考虑换用平板。

text: She says for her, the iPad is more of an entertainment device.
zh: 她说,对她而言,iPad更像是一台娱乐设备。

text: In her words, if Microsoft is coming out with a tablet
zh: 用她的话说,如果微软推出一款平板,

text: that actually you can type and actually do different things other than just swipe,
zh: 让你真的能打字、真的能做各种事情,而不只是滑来滑去,

text: then that would be better.
zh: 那就更好了。

text: Many technology Lovers, including Catherine Clinch, are excited about the new device.
zh: 许多科技爱好者,包括凯瑟琳·克林奇在内,都对这款新设备感到兴奋。

text: She points out that the surface stands by itself, so you don't have to buy a stand.
zh: 她指出,Surface能自己立起来,所以你不必再买支架。

text: Also, there is a keyboard that can also act as a cover.
zh: 此外,还有一款既能当键盘、又能当保护盖的键盘。

text: Those are all wonderful things, she says, but what interests her most is the potential to get rid of the netbook,
zh: 她说,这些都很棒,但最让她感兴趣的,是它有望取代上网本的潜力,

text: to get rid of the laptop, to maybe even down the line get rid of the full computer.
zh: 取代笔记本电脑,甚至将来有可能取代整台电脑。

text: Fox Van Allen is a technology expert.
zh: 福克斯·范艾伦是一位科技专家。

text: He agrees the Surface seems to have more to offer than the iPad.
zh: 他也认为,Surface似乎比iPad能提供更多。

text: He says it's a device that that almost serves as a replacement for a PC.
zh: 他说,这是一款几乎可以充当PC替代品的设备。

text: The Surface is meant to compete with the iPad, but not everyone is sure it is a better product.
zh: Surface意在与iPad竞争,但并非人人都确信它是更好的产品。

text: John Ayala says he is glad there is a competitor, but he is sticking with his iPad.
zh: 约翰·阿亚拉说,他很高兴出现了一个竞争者,但他还是会坚守自己的iPad。

text: For years, Microsoft has made software, not computers.
zh: 多年来,微软一直做软件,而不是电脑。

text: A few earlier attempts by the company to make and sell hardware products failed.
zh: 该公司早先几次制造和销售硬件产品的尝试都失败了。

text: That includes the Zune music player.
zh: 这其中包括Zune音乐播放器。

text: It could not compete against Apple's iPod.
zh: 它没能与苹果的iPod抗衡。

text: Estimates place the value of the tablet computer market at about $79 billion this year.
zh: 据估计,今年平板电脑市场的规模约为790亿美元。

text: Microsoft hopes to capture a share of that market with its latest device.
zh: 微软希望凭借这款最新设备夺得该市场的一份份额。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Mario Ritter.
zh: 美国之音特别英语,我是马里奥·里特。
